6-24-BRA-SCO.note: Brazil have effectively clinched. Scotland mostly need to avoid a bad loss that wrecks tiebreakers.

6-24-MAR-HAI.note: Morocco can still chase first via goal differential. Haiti are eliminated.

6-24-CAN-SUI.note: Both teams are practically through. A draw guarantees advancement for both and gives Canada first.

6-24-BIH-QAT.note: Basically an elimination match. Winner likely advances; draw is probably useless.

6-24-MEX-CZE.note: Mexico already clinched first and have nothing at stake. Czechia likely need a win.

6-24-KOR-RSA.note: South Korea advance with a win or draw. South Africa are basically win-or-bust.

6-25-CIV-CUW.note: Cote d'Ivoire lock up second with a win. Curacao are win-or-bust despite awful goal differential.

6-25-GER-ECU.note: Germany already clinched the group. Ecuador are basically in a win-or-go-home spot.

6-25-JPN-SWE.note: Japan still have reason to push for first on tiebreakers. Sweden advance with a win, likely with a draw, and could survive even with a loss.

6-25-NED-TUN.note: Netherlands have effectively clinched but winning the group matters. Tunisia are eliminated.

6-25-USA-TUR.note: USA already won the group. Match is mostly irrelevant and they may rotate to protect players on yellow cards.

6-25-PAR-AUS.note: Australia are in decent shape either way. Paraguay badly want the fourth point, so this could get drawish.

6-26-FRA-NOR.note: Both teams already advanced. This is only for first place; France keep it with a win or draw, Norway need a win.

6-26-SEN-IRQ.note: Senegal need a win and probably want margin for goal differential. Iraq need a miracle even if they win.

6-26-EGY-IRN.note: Egypt are basically through and can likely win the group with a win or draw. Iran still need points and could even win the group with help.

6-26-BEL-NZL.note: Belgium likely advance with a win and maybe with a draw. New Zealand are basically win-or-go-home.

6-26-CPV-KSA.note: Cape Verde likely advance with a win or draw. Saudi Arabia are basically win-or-bust.

6-26-ESP-URU.note: Spain are chasing first and a draw probably does it. Uruguay are in a weird spot where third may be better than second because Argentina awaits the runner-up.

6-27-ENG-PAN.note: England are nearly through but still want first and have incentive to run up the score. Panama are eliminated.

6-27-CRO-GHA.note: Both teams are likely alive either way, but first place is very valuable. Ghana are almost through; Croatia can win the group with help.

6-27-AUT-ALG.note: Austria and Algeria have a huge incentive to settle for a draw because four points probably gets both through.

6-27-ARG-JOR.note: Argentina already clinched the group and mostly have nothing to play for. Jordan are eliminated.

6-27-POR-COL.note: Colombia clinched advancement and win the group with a win or draw. Portugal are almost surely through but still have real incentive to win the group.

6-27-COD-UZB.note: DR Congo should advance with a win. Uzbekistan need a lot of help and probably need a multi-goal win.
